name: I missed a week of work from neck pain after work accident, what benefits get?
description: 2/3 wages starting day 4 of missed work.

mainEntity.name: I missed a week of work from neck pain after work accident, what benefits get?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2/3 wages starting day 4 of missed work.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability pays 2/3 of average weekly wages from day 4 in Utah/Idaho, up to state max.** Continues until max medical improvement.[5] Key factors: Doctor excuses work; wage records needed; light duty may reduce. File for TTD promptly. Permanent benefits follow if lasting issues.
